name: Exterminant
short_description: Exterminant is a small casual game where you exterminate every bug you find to feed your killing machine. Research new technologies to increase your destruction power and create powerful decks using your new tech.
detailed_description:
"Congratulations on your new position at Exterminant Inc. We are excited to announce that your snake RC will be delivered at your house soon. We recommend you to start making your first weapon as soon as possible. Good luck with the extermination agent." - Exterminant Inc. HR Department

Exterminant is a Casual Roguelike Shooter where you control and grow a snake RC with just one goal: KILL. AS. MUCH. AS. YOU. CAN

While on duty, some bugs that you kill may occasionally drop money, this money can be used to upgrade and research new technologies for your snake RC.

Enter on a consistent extermination streak and take the glorious Exterminant Inc. to the top companies of the month.

"I hate bugs, and them hate them too, big money" - Anonymous Customer
